exercises.title: Surface Code Layout Generator
exercises.description: Implement a complete surface code layout generator.
tasks: Generate data qubit positions for distance d
Place X and Z ancillas in checkerboard pattern
Create ASCII visualization of the layout
hints: Data qubits: d×d grid at positions (0..d-1, 0..d-1)
X and Z alternate in checkerboard

exercises.title: Stabilizer Definition Tool
exercises.description: Create stabilizer operators from the lattice geometry.
tasks: Find neighboring data qubits for each ancilla
Create stabilizer check matrices H_x and H_z
Print stabilizer generators in Pauli notation
hints: Each ancilla has up to 4 neighboring data qubits
CSS property ensures all stabilizers commute

exercises.title: Logical Operator Constructor
exercises.description: Construct and verify logical X and Z operators.
tasks: Verify logical operators commute with all stabilizers
Verify X_L and Z_L anticommute with each other
hints: X_L: any horizontal path across the code
Z_L: any vertical path across the code

exercises.title: Code Parameter Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze surface code parameters and scaling behavior.
tasks: Compute [[n, k, d]] for various distances
